name: agentmemory
description: Persistent memory for AI coding agents -- captures tool usage, compresses via LLM, injects context into future sessions. 12 hooks, 53 MCP tools, 8 skills, real-time viewer.

timezone.label: Display Timezone
timezone.description: IANA timezone for displaying timestamps (e.g., 'Asia/Shanghai', 'America/New_York', 'Europe/London'). Leave empty to see UTC timestamps.
